Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd
Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd, (DMS) is a pioneering IT Company in Sri Lanka, now in its 48
th
year of operations. DMS represents the world’s leading IT brands and specializes in Systems Integration and Customized Software Solutions for Sri Lankan and overseas markets.
DMS provides the excitement of working with the world’s leading IT brands, financial solutions and learning from the most experienced managers and professionals in the IT industry.
DMS represents Diebold Nixdorf Inc. USA, the world leader in CRMs (Cash Recycling Machines) and ATMs (Automated Teller Machines) and while having implemented the following pioneering Projects, DMS is the market leader supporting an installed base of over 2000 CRMs and ATMs in Sri Lanka and the Maldives.
Introduced ATMs to the Maldives in 1999
First CRMs in Sri Lanka and in the Maldives
First Branch and Networked Bulk Cash Depositors in Asia Pacific.
First Envelope-less Cash Acceptance ATMs in Asia Pacific.
First Envelope-less Bulk Cheque Deposit ATMs in Asia Pacific.
First Networked Foreign Currency Conversion ATMs which accept foreign currency and dispense Sri Lanka Currency and Coins.
Career advancement is based on performance and merit. The following vacancies now exist for candidates living in and around Kuliyapitiya to provide field service and support for ATMs and Cash Recyclers in this area and only candidates residing in Kuliyapitiya should apply.
Engineering Service Executives for Kuliyapitiya (Male)
Career opportunities exist for disciplined, motivated, self-reliant persons in Field Engineering Services who possess a positive attitude and can work under minimum supervision after initial training.
Candidates should: -
Be under 27 years of age.
Have as a minimum a National Diploma in Engineering Sciences (NDES) or HNDE or NDT or similar qualification in Electronics Engineering or Mechatronics Engineering from a recognized institution.
Have knowledge of PC hardware and Windows software.
Selected candidates will be required to service and maintain ATMs & Cash Recyclers installed at various banks in the Kuliyapitiya area. Only those who wish to pursue a career in self-service banking devices should apply.
Candidates should reside in the Kuliyapitiya Town or in close proximity to the Kuliyapitiya Town and have a motorcycle or scooter together with the relevant riding license.
Successful candidates who perform to the Company's expectations have a career path with promotional prospects to Senior ATM Service Engineers, Team Leaders, Group Managers, Department Managers and beyond.
GENERAL
• The above position includes a negotiable salary.
Please E-mail your CV stating names and addresses of two referees to
careers@dmslanka2.com
. Indicate the post applied for as the Subject of your E-mail.

HEAD OF OPERATIONAL EXCELLENCE - COLOMBo
Position Overview:
The Head of Operational Excellence will be a high-level strategic leader responsible for steering continuous improvement initiatives across all factory and support operations. This role requires a visionary approach to operational design, process improvement, technological innovation, and adaptive manufacturing models based on macroeconomic dynamics. Additionally, the position encompasses oversight of industrial engineering activities including work studies, method optimization, capacity planning, and facility layout to maximize operational efficiency and flexibility.
Key Responsibilities:
Strategic & Operational Leadership:
Formulate and implement a comprehensive Operational Excellence strategy aligned with the Company’s international growth, diversification, and resilience goals. Develop adaptable operating models that respond swiftly to macroeconomic shifts such as currency fluctuations, inflation, or supply chain disruptions.
Process Optimization & Continuous Improvement:
Lead deployment of LEAN, Six Sigma, Kaizen, and other continuous improvement methodologies. Focus on waste elimination, process standardization, yield optimization, and operational agility across all manufacturing sites.
Industrial Engineering & Work Studies:
Oversee all industrial engineering activities, including work measurement, method study, time study, line balancing, facility layout optimization, and capacity analysis. Implement work standardization and ergonomic improvements to enhance productivity and safety.
Digital & Technological Transformation:
Accelerate adoption of Industry 4.0, automation, IoT, and data analytics to improve efficiency, predictive maintenance, and decision-making. Ensure manufacturing systems are flexible enough to adapt to shifting economic and market conditions.
Evolving Operating Models & Macro-economic Responsiveness:
Develop and refine flexible operating frameworks that adjust to macroeconomic variables. Conduct scenario planning and economic modeling to optimize capacity, costs, and supply chain under different regional and global conditions.
Supporting International & New Facility Projects:
Collaborate with cross-functional teams in setting up new manufacturing facilities abroad, ensuring operational standards, scalability, and flexibility tailored to local market conditions.
Product Diversification & High-Margin Development:
Enable production processes for new high-margin non-dairy products. Support innovation pipelines with process engineering and operational scalability.
Contract Manufacturing & White Label Operations:
Develop standards, KPIs, and oversight mechanisms for third-party manufacturing and white-labeled products. Optimize costs, quality, and logistics integration for seamless third-party operations.
Supply Chain & Capacity Planning:
Identify bottlenecks, optimize inventory levels, and develop scalable supply chain models resilient to macroeconomic risks. Use industrial engineering tools for capacity planning and bottleneck analysis.
Performance Monitoring & Data-Driven Decision Making:
Establish KPIs related to safety, quality, efficiency, energy, and sustainability. Utilize work studies, time analysis, and process audits for continuous improvement.
Change Management & Culture Development:
Lead initiatives to embed a culture of operational excellence, agility, and innovation. Provide training, mentorship, and leadership to operational teams.
Compliance & Sustainability:
Ensure all manufacturing activities adhere to global standards (ISO, HACCP, FDA) and promote eco-friendly practices to meet sustainability goals.
Leadership & Stakeholder Engagement:
Direct a skilled team of industrial engineers, quality professionals, and operations managers. Foster collaboration across departments to align operational goals with corporate strategy.
Industry & Market Insights:
Keep abreast of global industry trends, technological innovations, and macroeconomic factors, applying insights to optimize manufacturing strategies.
Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Industrial Engineering, Food Technology, Manufacturing, or related fields; master's degree or MBA preferred.
• 10-15+ years leading operational/excellence functions in dairy, FMCG, or food processing industries, with international exposure.
• Proven expertise in LEAN, Six Sigma, Kaizen, work study, work measurement, and industrial engineering practices.
• Experience in developing and implementing flexible operating models based on macroeconomic variables.
• Strong background in Industry 4.0, automation, digital transformation, and data analytics.
• Demonstrated success in managing multi-site operations, international manufacturing setups, and optimizing contract manufacturing/white-labeling.
• Expertise in capacity planning, facility layout optimization, work design, and method studies.
• Excellent leadership, stakeholder management,
YOUR OFFER IS NEGOTIABLE AS PER YOUR

Requirments
B.Sc in supply chain management/ Science/ Engineering from recognized uniersity or Higher Diploma in supply chain management from ISMM.
Minimum 5 yeras of experience in the field of procurement. Specializing in agriculture products.
Proven experience in FMCG / and or food manufacturing industry is essential.
Knowledge in food safety and compliance BRCGS/FCCS/ISO 22000.
Strong knowledge of procurement processes, inventory management, and vendor negotiation.
Proficient in MS XL, PPT, SAGE/SAP ERP experience.
Should possess good communication skill in English.
Knowledge of logistics, import and export.
Cross functional collaboration.
Skill in annual budgeting.
Strayegic sourcing and risk mitigation skills.
Excellent negotiation skill, time management & communication skills are reqired.
Ability work in data driven environment.
5S, lean and TPM qualifications will be added advantage.

IE EXECUTIVE - KATUNAYAKA
Responsibilities
Participate in product development meetings and provide proactive technical input.
Prepare mock-ups, operation bulletins, SMV, and line layouts for efficient production.
Plan manpower allocation, skill development, and machine/attachment requirements in advance.
Coordinate pre-production testing, line samples, and layout confirmation with production and quality teams.
Support new style introductions by training operators, arranging workplace layouts, and communicating SMV and target efficiencies.
Conduct line balancing, capacity studies, and implement method improvements to enhance productivity and reduce SMV.
Monitor daily production efficiency and organize performance review meetings with the production team.
Perform technical and cost reconciliations post-production and provide insights for process improvements.
Evaluate workforce performance, support incentive and motivation programs, and drive continuous improvement initiatives.
Maintain documentation, analyze productivity data, and update management on system and process improvements.
Participate in management meetings and contribute proactive technical inputs and project support.
Qualifications
Degree / Diploma in Industrial Engineering or Textile & Apparel Technology.
Minimum 2–3 years’ experience in a similar capacity within the apparel industry, specializing in Denim garments.
Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
Hands-on experience in IE tools, SMV analysis, line balancing, and productivity improvement?
Salary - Negotiable & very Attractive

Junior Manager (Marketing)
Work From Home
At Bizycorp Pvt Ltd, we warmly invite eligible candidates to apply for this excellent work-from-home opportunity with a legitimate and growing company based in Sri Lanka.
If you are passionate about online events, podcasts, and marketing — and you are a charismatic, emerging leader who can inspire and guide a team toward achieving ambitious goals — then this position is perfect for you!
Job Responsibilities
Plan, execute, and host successful online events and podcasts in collaboration with healthcare professionals in the US and UK.
Design and implement effective promotional campaigns to achieve 200+ registrants per event.
Drive increased podcast downloads and create strategic interlinks to the sales funnel.
Reverse-engineer sales targets and develop actionable plans to meet or exceed assigned revenue goals.
Train and coach event and podcast team members to improve performance and quality.
Continuously improve existing processes and develop new, efficient workflows.
Develop and execute high-impact social media strategies.
Conduct team audits, strengthen accountability, and implement performance improvement measures.
Provide weekly progress reports directly to the CEO.
Manage and nurture partnerships with key stakeholders and collaborators.
​​
Expected Qualifications & Skills
2 to 3 years of marketing experience, including at least 1 to 2 years in a leadership or assistant managerial role.
Experience managing events, podcasts, or similar project-based work.
Strong knowledge of online marketing and basic analytics.
Experience guiding teams and working with cross-functional groups.
Strong troubleshooting and process-building skills.
Confident in leading partner calls and building rapport.
Strong communication, leadership, and planning skills.
Ability to work independently with little supervision.
Preferred
Experience in working in marketing agency setting
Experience with registrant acquisition strategies.
Experience with digital content growth or podcast promotion.
Comfort working on performance based targets and timelines.
